title: Movement Type Detection (Deploy)
description: Deploy on PSOC™ Edge AI Kit an IMU-based movement pattern classifier.
long_description: This project shows you how to deploy on PSOC™ Edge AI Kit a model capable of differentiating between 3 different movement types, circle, shaking and stationary, based on IMU (6-axis accelerometer and gyroscope) data. The model is suitable for gestures-based applications.

links.label: GitHub
links.heading: Try Today
links.sub-heading: Deploy the pre-trained model to your PSOC™ Edge AI Kit
